name: Generative Art
description: Gallery-grade algorithmic art rendered locally — no external APIs. Two print styles (Bauhaus × Wabi-Sabi giclée, 1960s constructivist risograph) across six composition algorithms, with static PNG output for e-ink and seamless animated WebP loops for LCD/OLED displays.
author: Ryan Lane

style.title: Print Style
style.description: wabi = Wabi-Sabi giclée; constructivist = 60s risograph; phosphor = ASCII terminal; blueprint = cyanotype; neon = synthwave glow

algorithm.title: Algorithm
algorithm.description: Composition engine — auto picks per piece

output_mode.title: Output
output_mode.description: static = PNG (use for e-ink); animated = looping WebP (LCD/OLED only)

seed_mode.title: New Piece
seed_mode.description: How often a new composition is generated

seed.title: Fixed Seed
seed.description: Composition number used when New Piece is 'fixed'

density.title: Density
density.description: How much of the frame the composition occupies

texture_strength.title: Texture Strength
texture_strength.description: Paper grain and ink distress, as a percent of the style default

frames.title: Animation Frames
frames.description: Frames per loop in animated mode

frame_ms.title: Frame Duration (ms)
frame_ms.description: Milliseconds per frame in animated mode

endpoints.description: Render a piece at the requested resolution
Small PNG preview for the manage UI
